TSLA: Gary Black Cites Steve Jobs, Stephen King To Reiterate Importance Of Marketing For Tesla: 'FSD Has A Take Rate Of Just 15%…'. Investor Gary Black emphasized the critical need for a strong marketing strategy for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA), citing the low 15% adoption rate of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology despite advances. He referenced Steve Jobs on customer experience and Stephen King on brand value, arguing that even with great engineering and a shift towards AI, products don't sell themselves. Black believes Tesla needs to invest in brand equity and marketing to increase its intrinsic value and stay competitive.

Tesla Tries A New Europe Fix: Cheaper, Longer-Range Model Y — Stock Rises Premarket. Tesla has introduced a new, cheaper, longer-range Model Y variant in Europe, aiming to boost demand in a region where sales have been inconsistent. This new Standard Long Range trim offers approximately 350 miles of range at a lower price point than existing premium long-range options. The move comes as Tesla faced a challenging year in much of Europe, despite strong performance in Norway.

GraniteShares YieldBOOST ETFs: A New Take on Income Generation. GraniteShares has introduced YieldBOOST ETFs, designed to offer high distribution rates by selling put options on leveraged ETFs. These funds aim to maximize distributions for shareholders by capitalizing on the volatility of underlying assets like NVIDIA, Tesla, and Bitcoin, while not directly investing in the securities themselves. Key differentiators include using leveraged ETFs, providing downside protection by purchasing put options, and offering weekly income distributions through weekly FLEX options.

Does WEX's (WEX) Embedded B2B Payments Push Mark a Shift in Its Core Investment Story?. WEX is increasingly focusing on embedded B2B payments and integrating with technologies like the Tesla Supercharger network, shifting its investment narrative from traditional fuel cards to diversified digital payment flows. While this strategic pivot aims for growth and improves its earnings outlook, competitive pressures in the digital finance sector create varying fair value estimates among investors. The company projects significant revenue and earnings growth by 2028, supported by its move into embedded payments.

Automakers' share in China NEV market in 2025: BYD leads with 27.2%, Tesla 5th with 4.9%. In 2025, BYD maintained its lead in China's new energy vehicle (NEV) market with a 27.2% share, despite a 6.3% year-on-year sales decline. Tesla, ranking fifth, saw its market share drop to 4.9% from 6.0% in 2024. Geely and Changan also showed significant growth in the NEV and overall passenger vehicle markets, respectively.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA) Wells Fargo Maintains Bearish Forecast. Wells Fargo analyst Colin Langan has reaffirmed an Underweight (Sell-equivalent) rating for Tesla Inc. (TSLA), despite an upward revision of the 12-month price target to $130 from $120. The firm remains bearish due to concerns over slowing vehicle demand, intensifying competition, margin pressure, and a belief that Tesla's valuation is disconnected from its near-term earnings power, implying a significant downside from its current share price.

Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC. This SEC filing (Form 424B2) from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details a new offering of Callable Equity-Linked Notes due February 2, 2029, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The notes do not bear interest and their maturity payment is linked to the performance of the lesser performing stock among Tesla, Meta Platforms, and NVIDIA. Goldman Sachs has the option to redeem the notes on various "call payment dates" beginning in February 2027.

Cornyn drops in at Tesla's Gigafactory Texas to tout Elon Musk's investments in Texas. Senator John Cornyn visited Tesla's Gigafactory Texas, praising Elon Musk's investments and job creation in the state amidst his tough primary race. He is also scheduled to visit SpaceX Starbase and Lockheed-Martin as part of his campaign efforts. Cornyn's efforts to align with Musk could help secure support from Trump's base, especially as the primary election approaches.
TGT: Mystery solved: Target to anchor large West Side retail center after months of speculation. Target will be the anchor tenant for a new 22-acre retail center being developed by Midland Atlantic Properties in a western suburb of Cincinnati. The center, expected to open in 2027, will also include banks, a grocery store, and multiple restaurants, according to conceptual renderings. This announcement resolves previous speculation regarding the retail center's main tenant.

Can AI-Driven Trend Forecasting Restore Target's Merchandising Edge?. Target Corporation is leveraging AI, particularly its "Target Trend Brain" platform and a synthetic audience engine, to improve merchandising, identify emerging trends faster, and enhance product-market alignment in discretionary categories. This strategic shift has already shown positive results in areas like toys and video games. Meanwhile, competitors like Walmart and Best Buy are also expanding their AI initiatives to personalize customer experiences and streamline operations.
SBUX: First Horizon Corp Invests $6.38 Million in Starbucks Corporation $SBUX. First Horizon Corp has invested $6.38 million in Starbucks Corporation, acquiring 75,364 shares in the third quarter. Institutional investors now collectively own approximately 72.29% of Starbucks, while insiders own about 0.09%. Despite missing EPS estimates, Starbucks beat revenue expectations and announced a quarterly dividend, maintaining a "Hold" consensus rating among analysts with a price target of $102.12.

Starbucks Unusual Options Activity For January 12. Deep-pocketed investors have shown a bullish interest in Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) through unusual options activity, with Benzinga's scanner identifying 14 extraordinary options trades. Analysis of these trades indicates a divided sentiment, with 64% bullish and 28% bearish, and a predicted price range target for Starbucks between $55.0 and $115.0 over the last three months. Two analysts currently cover Starbucks, with price targets ranging from $86 to $110, and the company's earnings announcement is expected in 15 days.
DIS: GRIMES & Co WEALTH MANAGEMENT LLC Has $9.64 Million Stock Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS. GRIMES & Co WEALTH MANAGEMENT LLC increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 10.1% in Q3, now holding 84,221 shares valued at $9.64 million. The company's stock is largely owned by institutional investors, with key catalysts including a Disney-OpenAI partnership and strong box-office performance. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $135.20, despite headwinds from streaming competition.

OpenAI: Disney’s Billion-Dollar Partner. The Walt Disney Company has announced a $1 billion equity investment in OpenAI, including a three-year licensing agreement that allows OpenAI users to access over 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars characters for short video creation via the Sora app and image generation from ChatGPT. This partnership, which includes a one-year exclusivity period, aims to extend Disney's storytelling through generative AI, despite concerns from creative unions. The deal is expected to give OpenAI's Sora a competitive edge in enterprise creative work, potentially accelerating the race for exclusive IP in the AI industry.

Adeia stock hits 52-week high at 19.04 USD. Adeia Inc. (ADEA) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $19.04 USD, marking a robust performance with a 43.73% 1-year return and a 27.32% gain over the past six months. Despite a Q3 2025 earnings miss, the company's financial outlook was significantly revised upwards due to a new licensing agreement with The Walt Disney Company, leading Rosenblatt to raise its price target to $20 with a Buy rating. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with a "GREAT" financial health rating and a strong buy consensus from analysts.

Netflix vs. Disney: Which Streaming Giant Has an Edge Right Now?. This article analyzes whether Netflix (NFLX) or Disney (DIS) is a better investment, comparing their financial performance, content strategies, and valuation. While Netflix leads in subscribers and content spending, Disney demonstrates strong profitability in streaming and diversified revenue streams from theme parks and robust IP. The analysis concludes that Disney offers a more attractive valuation and long-term upside due to its diversified model and accelerating streaming profitability, despite both stocks currently holding a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).
NKE: Rare Nike shoes stolen from storage facility in Beaverton; arrests made. Beaverton police have arrested Dustin Alexander Kosmecki, 47, and Corey David Schmidt, 45, in connection with the burglary of multiple storage units, one of which contained rare Nike shoes. The pair allegedly rented a Public Storage unit to gain access and then traveled through ceiling spaces to steal an estimated $100,000 worth of items. They were charged with first-degree burglary and aggravated theft, and authorities believe there may be additional victims.
